ads.ad_title: Snacks Starting at ₹19 — Zomato Red Background Ad

style.overall_style: Flat bold Zomato-red background with clean product photography and strong typographic price layout

design_language.approach: Solid brand-red background acts as canvas — text block upper zone, floating product center-lower, brand name bottom
design_language.visual_hierarchy: Large price headline upper zone → black free delivery bar below → floating food product center → brand name bottom
design_language.composition: Three-zone vertical: text header → floating product → brand footer — clean and structured
design_language.depth: Completely flat red background — product appears to float with drop shadow giving only illusion of depth
design_language.border_element: Solid black full-width bar behind free delivery text — creates strong horizontal divider and contrast band

color_logic.primary_background: Zomato brand red — bold, flat, full-bleed
color_logic.color_emotion: Flat Zomato red creates instant brand recognition and urgency — black bar adds visual weight and separates offers clearly — white text is clean and readable at any scroll speed

typography.headline_font_style: Extra bold condensed sans-serif, all caps — very aggressive weight
typography.headline_size: Price (₹19) is the dominant element — extremely large
typography.supporting_text_style: Bold sans-serif on black bar — slightly smaller
typography.brand_name_style: Lowercase Zomato signature font — bottom center
typography.font_weight_hierarchy: Price number largest → category word large → delivery bar text medium → brand name small
typography.text_case: All caps for promotional text, lowercase brand

text_placement.primary_headline: Upper zone — SNACKS STARTING AT ₹19 in single line across frame
text_placement.delivery_bar: Directly below headline — full width black bar with white text
text_placement.brand_name: Bottom center — in open red zone below product

graphics_and_image_placement.main_product_image: Center-lower — samosas on black slate plate with green chutney dip, floating on red background
graphics_and_image_placement.background: Flat Zomato red — no texture, no gradient
graphics_and_image_placement.image_treatment: Clean floating product shot with subtle drop shadow — product isolated from any environment

message_delivery.primary_message: Shockingly low entry price point for snacks
message_delivery.strategy: Price shock on brand red — ₹19 is an impulse-triggering micro-price that removes all purchase hesitation
message_delivery.cta_style: Implicit — brand name at bottom anchors the platform
message_delivery.urgency_level: Very high — specific micro-price with first order free delivery stacked

typography.headline_size: Price (₹149) dominates upper zone — same scale treatment as Ad 1
typography.font_weight_hierarchy: Same as Ad 1 — price largest → category large → bar text medium → brand small

graphics_and_image_placement.main_product_image: Center-lower — copper handi pot with biryani, floating on red background with drop shadow

ads.ad_title: Zomato Gold ₹1 for 3 Months — Dark Textured Ad

style.overall_style: Dark premium textured background with gold accent typography and subscription offer layout

design_language.approach: Dark premium canvas — gold brand name accent, massive price shock text, floating food center, gold horizontal bar bottom
design_language.visual_hierarchy: GET zomato GOLD headline top → massive ₹1 price center-upper → food center → gold bar with badge bottom
design_language.composition: Centered vertical hierarchy — text flows from top through food to bottom bar in single axis
design_language.depth: Dark stone/slate textured background gives premium materiality — food bowl floats above with shadow
design_language.border_element: Gold/amber full-width horizontal bar at bottom with circular badge overlay for condition text

color_logic.primary_background: Very dark charcoal/black with subtle stone texture — premium dark field

text_colors.duration_text: White with small gold leaf/arrow decoratives

color_logic.color_emotion: Dark background with gold accents is a universal luxury signifier — positions Zomato Gold as a premium membership product rather than a discount — the ₹1 price creates extreme cognitive dissonance between perceived premium value and actual price

typography.headline_font_style: Mixed — Zomato lowercase signature for brand name, extra bold condensed sans-serif for offer text
typography.headline_size: ₹1 is the single largest text element — enormous scale emphasizes price shock
typography.supporting_text_style: Bold sans-serif for duration text with decorative leaf/arrow dividers
typography.brand_name_style: Lowercase Zomato signature embedded in headline
typography.font_weight_hierarchy: ₹1 largest → ONLY AT large → FOR 3 MONTHS medium → bar text medium → badge text small
typography.text_case: Mixed — sentence structure with brand lowercase, all caps for emphasis words

text_placement.headline_block: Upper center — GET zomato GOLD / ONLY AT ₹1 stacked
text_placement.duration_text: Below price, center — FOR 3 MONTHS with decorative dividers
text_placement.gold_bar: Bottom — full width gold horizontal bar
text_placement.condition_badge: Overlaid on right end of gold bar — circular white badge

graphics_and_image_placement.main_product_image: Center frame — dark teal bowl of vegetable fried rice, floating on dark background
graphics_and_image_placement.decorative_elements: Small gold leaf/arrow icons flanking duration text
graphics_and_image_placement.image_treatment: Floating product on dark textured background — bowl styled simply, food feels wholesome and everyday

message_delivery.primary_message: Subscription product (Zomato Gold) at shocking introductory price
message_delivery.strategy: Premium aesthetic + micro price creates maximum cognitive impact — the gap between gold/luxury presentation and ₹1 price is the entire message — drives subscription sign-ups
message_delivery.cta_style: Implicit — offer clarity serves as CTA
message_delivery.urgency_level: Extreme — ₹1 for 3 months is a time-limited acquisition offer — implicit scarcity

consistent_zomato_elements: Lowercase 'zomato' logotype always present — bottom-center in most ads
White as universal text color across all dark and red backgrounds
Price or social proof number always the single largest typographic element
High-quality professionally styled food photography — always floating or styled hero
Portrait/vertical format (7 of 8 ads) optimized for mobile Stories
Red as the dominant brand accent color across all 8 ads

design_system_families_identified.system_name: Zomato Red Flat Background — Category Price Template
design_system_families_identified.shared_elements: Identical layout: solid Zomato red background, bold white price headline, full-width black delivery bar, floating food with drop shadow, white brand name bottom — only food category and price change
design_system_families_identified.insight: Highly efficient modular template covering multiple food categories (snacks, biryani) with zero layout change — pure content swap system

design_system_families_identified.system_name: Dark Diagonal Red Ribbon — Category Price Template
design_system_families_identified.shared_elements: Same diagonal ribbon design as burger ad in previous ad set — confirms this is a multi-category campaign template covering burger, pizza with identical ribbon element
design_system_families_identified.insight: Cross-set template — same diagonal ribbon element used across burger and pizza categories

design_system_families_identified.system_name: Zomato Gold — Dark Premium Gold System
design_system_families_identified.shared_elements: Dark stone/slate background, gold accent typography for GOLD word, same bottom gold horizontal bar with leaf/arrow icons, same ₹1 for 3 months offer — Ad 4 adds FLASH SALE label for urgency escalation
design_system_families_identified.insight: Two-variant premium subscription campaign — base version (Ad 3) and urgency-amplified version (Ad 4) — same design system, different urgency level

design_system_families_identified.system_name: Social Proof — Dark Halftone Frame Template
design_system_families_identified.shared_elements: Identical: dark halftone textured background, red full-width strips top and bottom as frame, enormous white social proof number, floating food product, red brushstroke brand badge bottom — only food category and numbers change
design_system_families_identified.insight: Multi-category social proof campaign — same authoritative design system applied to pizza and biryani — effectively builds platform credibility through volume data rather than discounts

messaging_strategy_tracks.approach: Specific low rupee price (₹19, ₹149, ₹99) as headline — flat or dark background, food as validator — targets impulse decision-making
Premium product (Zomato Gold) at shocking introductory price (₹1) — dark luxury aesthetic creates perceived value gap — targets habitual users for upsell
Witty relatable copy embedded in lifestyle scene — discount secondary to emotional resonance — targets specific audience segment (health-conscious)
Volume data (11 lakh, 18 lakh weekly orders) as primary persuasion — no discount needed — peer conformity psychology drives action — targets hesitant or new users

cross_ad_patterns.design_language_summary: These 8 ads reveal Zomato's highly systematic, template-driven ad production approach. Multiple confirmed design systems are in operation simultaneously — flat red template, dark diagonal ribbon, dark gold premium, dark halftone social proof. Each system is reusable across food categories, requiring only content swaps. This enables high-volume ad production with brand consistency.
cross_ad_patterns.color_strategy_summary: Red is the dominant brand color appearing in all 8 ads — as full background (Ads 1,2), as ribbon accent (Ad 5), as frame strips (Ads 7,8), as badge element (Ads 6,7,8). Dark backgrounds (black, charcoal, dark stone) appear in 6 of 8 ads — maximizing food color contrast. Gold is used exclusively for the premium Gold membership product line. White is the universal text color.
cross_ad_patterns.typography_strategy_summary: Consistent rule: the most important number (price, discount, social proof) is always the largest text element — engineered for thumb-scroll legibility at 0.3 second exposure. Brand name is always small and lowercase. Social proof ads use display-scale numbers that function almost as graphic elements rather than pure text.
cross_ad_patterns.food_photography_strategy: All food photography follows floating product technique (isolated on flat/dark background with drop shadow) or contextual lifestyle technique (in hands, on surfaces). Floating technique dominates in template-system ads for maximum production efficiency. Dark moody lighting consistent across all product shots for appetite-enhancing drama.
badge_and_graphic_element_inventory: Full-width black bar (Ads 1, 2) — delivery condition separator
Diagonal red ribbon/banner (Ad 5) — price callout across food photo
Full-width gold horizontal bar (Ads 3, 4) — premium bottom anchor
Circular white condition badge on gold bar (Ad 3)
Red pill badge for brand name (Ad 6)
Red full-width top and bottom frame strips (Ads 7, 8)
Red brushstroke/paint badge for brand name (Ads 7, 8)
Red oval TRY IT OUT action badge (Ad 8)
